title: Junior Instructional Designer at Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates:
Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates!
